title: Sewer's Refreshed Books
description: This resource pack changes 2D books into 3D
body:
![A resource pack that turns Minecraft’s 2D books into 3D versions while keeping the original vanilla Minecraft look.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b64fec0de2b1abdc601b356239fa7d4d288f9ba2.png)
# <center>About</center>
**This resource pack replaces boring 2D books with their 3D versions, designed in Minecraft’s vanilla style! This is my first experience creating a resource pack, and I hope you enjoy it and have fun :p**
